🧠 Modest ratings for this level; stepping up in class; modest recent form, fit and race-ready; breeding is a positive (Dark Angel), well-handicapped at the weights; in-form trainer (J P Murtagh).
8 Delusional 2 Nando Parrado / Medicean 3.0 8-12 (-14) Nathan Crosse Daniel McLoughlin 76 57 828-7 42.1 5.8% 17.2 16.4 26.00 +2.3pp
📰 Runner-up on AW at Southwell on second run for Jack Channon; two runs for current yard have been ordinary, beaten 12l by Servare on last month's turf debut, having raced keenly; others preferred.
🧠 Modest ratings for this level; modest recent form, on a declining curve; well-handicapped at the weights; market doesn't agree — proceed with caution.
🧢 4W/95R 4% IV 0.56

      {
        "rank": 1,

        "ts": "80",
        "rpr": "94",

        "form": "311-",

        "dam_sire": "Pride Of Dubai",

        "score": "65.7",
        "model_pct": "22.4%",
        "fair_odds": "4.47",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won at Chester (6f, good) last June on second start and comfortably followed up in novice there (6f, good) the following month; absent since and this handicap debut is a much tougher test of his credentials, but he's a bright prospect and it remains to be seen where his limitations lie."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Old Is Gold (IRE)",
        "jockey": "James Doyle",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "85",
        "rpr": "96",
        "or": "87",
        "form": "31830-",
        "sire": "Mehmas",
        "dam_sire": "Showcasing",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "63.8",
        "model_pct": "19.2%",
        "fair_odds": "5.21",
        "best_dec": "3.75",
        "edge": "-8.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Midfield in big-field nursery at York's Ebor meeting (6f, good to firm) last August when last seen; gelded since; however, close third in a nursery at Glorious Goodwood (6f, good to soft) previously, showing good pace, and he's in the picture on that form; also effective on good/good to firm."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Atticum (GB)",
        "jockey": "Marco Ghiani",
        "trainer": "Robert Cowell",
        "ts": "73",
        "rpr": "98",
        "or": "88",
        "form": "921-",
        "sire": "Ardad",
        "dam_sire": "Sir Prancealot",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "60.6",
        "model_pct": "14.9%",
        "fair_odds": "6.72",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Built upon last September's debut (5f, AW) to go close at Nottingham (5f, good to soft), then went one better at Yarmouth (5f, good to soft) in October when last seen; he could do with breaking more professionally but he impressed last time and could have plenty more to offer; yard in good form."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Ambishio (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Robert Havlin",
        "trainer": "Michael Appleby",
        "ts": "81",
        "rpr": "95",
        "or": "80",
        "form": "060-12",
        "sire": "Kuroshio",
        "dam_sire": "Kheleyf",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "54.4",
        "model_pct": "9.1%",
        "fair_odds": "10.95",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+3.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-5 last year, all on turf, but he showed promise and won a handicap at Southwell (5f, AW) in January on his first run since being gelded; close second at Southwell (5f, AW) a fortnight ago and could be thereabouts if the return to grass isn't an issue."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Hypnotised (GB)",
        "jockey": "Colin Keane",
        "trainer": "Harry Charlton",
        "ts": "53",
        "rpr": "95",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "441-",

        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "53.8",
        "model_pct": "8.7%",
        "fair_odds": "11.53",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-11.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Built upon the promise of his first two starts (6f, good/AW) when readily winning a Southwell maiden (5f, AW) at odds-on last September; his attractive pedigree provides optimism that he can take higher order still."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,

        "trainer": "Archie Watson",
        "ts": "75",
        "rpr": "93",

        "form": "10189-",

        "dam_sire": "No Nay Never",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "52.1",
        "model_pct": "7.6%",
        "fair_odds": "13.20",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+0.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won maiden/novice races at Ayr (6f, good to firm/good) last season on two of his first three starts; came up short in Group/sales races otherwise but reappears having been gelded and he could prove well suited by this first crack at 5f; interesting on handicap debut, especially if backed."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Black Star Boy (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Kieran Shoemark",
        "trainer": "Ed Walker",
        "ts": "76",
        "rpr": "90",
        "or": "88",
        "form": "618-",
        "sire": "Starman",
        "dam_sire": "Elusive Quality",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "51.1",
        "model_pct": "7.0%",
        "fair_odds": "14.26",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "-7.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won with something to spare at Newbury (6f, good to soft) last September on second start then pulled hard when mid-division in Listed race at York (6f, good); gelded since, which may settle him down, and this well-bred sort has potential off his opening mark."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,

        "trainer": "Ian Williams",

        "stall": 4,

        "fair_odds": "15.20",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Runner-up on debut at Ripon (6f, good) last August and won Kempton novice (6f, AW) in November on fourth start; some good AW handicap efforts since but not last time and he's probably vulnerable against unexposed types."
      },

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two wins last summer for Ger Lyons but down the field in Listed races last autumn on both starts for Charles Byrnes and soundly beaten in a handicap at Newmarket last Thursday on his stable/seasonal debut; others preferred."
      }

  {
    "course": "Doncaster",
    "time": "13:40",
    "race_name": "Grace And Dotty Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "5f",
    "going": "Good To Firm",
    "class": "Class 6",
    "draw_bias": "stands_side",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Trust Sergei",
        "jockey": "Cieren Fallon",
        "trainer": "Gary Hanmer",
        "ts": "62",
        "rpr": "66",
        "or": "54",
        "form": "95-746",
        "sire": "Sergei Prokofiev",
        "dam_sire": "Kyllachy",
        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "55.8",
        "model_pct": "13.2%",
        "fair_odds": "7.56",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-9.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Progressive last spring, following a 5f AW win with a ready 6f win at this track (good to firm); mixed bag since then but his penultimate fourth at Wolverhampton was encouraging; failed to back it up ten days later but no doubt the ability is there and he's well handicapped now."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Auntie Jo",
        "jockey": "Daniel Tudhope",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "63",
        "or": "53",
        "form": "556174",
        "sire": "Havana Grey",
        "dam_sire": "Dawn Approach",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "52.3",
        "model_pct": "9.8%",
        "fair_odds": "10.21",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "-3.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ready win in a first-time visor at Newcastle last month (5f); perfectly good efforts in defeat twice since, coming from well back having blown the start at Newcastle on Monday (6f); more to prove on turf but this should be run to suit."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "No Gain",
        "jockey": "Pat Cosgrave",
        "trainer": "Adam Kirby",
        "ts": "50",
        "rpr": "64",
        "or": "46",
        "form": "4651-4",
        "sire": "Territories",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 14,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "52.1",
        "model_pct": "9.7%",
        "fair_odds": "10.36",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "-3.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Tried over as far as 1m4f when trained by Martin Dunne; won a 7f event in Jersey last June; absent for 276 days prior to a close fourth at Wolverhampton last month (6f; first time in these retained accessories), an effort that can be marked up as she made a big move in the middle section of the race while racing on the outside of the field; dropping to 5f is new but a strongly run race at the trip could suit; suspicion a bigger effort is brewing."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Doralee",
        "jockey": "William Pyle(3)",
        "trainer": "David & Nicola Barron",
        "ts": "59",
        "rpr": "65",
        "or": "49",
        "form": "030-53",
        "sire": "Swiss Spirit",
        "dam_sire": "Paris House",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "47.9",
        "model_pct": "6.7%",
        "fair_odds": "14.84",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-3.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won a 5f classified event at Redcar last summer; close third to Golden Prosperity at Catterick 16 days ago (5f, good), always prominent; needs a bit more if she's to come out on top in this competitive sprint."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Vault Of Heaven (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Jack Mitchell",
        "trainer": "Kevin Frost",
        "ts": "58",
        "rpr": "63",
        "or": "48",
        "form": "75050-",
        "sire": "Far Above",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "47.2",
        "model_pct": "6.3%",
        "fair_odds": "15.87",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-5.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-12 and well beaten at Newcastle when last seen in November; he was sent off favourite on that occasion and returns from a break off a 2lb lower mark; no doubt the ability is there to win races if the addition of a hood has a calming effect (often races too freely)."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Opal Storm",
        "jockey": "Faye McManoman",
        "trainer": "Brian Rothwell",
        "ts": "63",
        "rpr": "67",
        "or": "55",
        "form": "507-91",
        "sire": "Hot Streak",
        "dam_sire": "Camacho",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "47.1",
        "model_pct": "6.3%",
        "fair_odds": "15.96",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "-4.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Produced late when winning a 5f handicap at Southwell three weeks ago; has the ability to defy a 3lb rise and she has run well over C&D in the past; one for the shortlist."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Masterclass",
        "jockey": "Rhys Elliott(5)",
        "trainer": "Paul Midgley",
        "ts": "64",
        "rpr": "67",
        "or": "51",
        "form": "0638-4",
        "sire": "Lethal Force",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "46.4",
        "model_pct": "5.9%",
        "fair_odds": "16.97",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-5.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ended a losing run when the comfortable winner of a 5f handicap at Nottingham last May (5f, good to firm) off a 1lb higher mark; he was returning from a short break when fourth of 13 at Pontefract 17 days ago and that effort can be upgraded as he was wider than ideal as the field turned for home; each-way shout."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Golden Prosperity",
        "jockey": "David Nolan",
        "trainer": "Tony Coyle & Kaine Wood",
        "ts": "54",
        "rpr": "64",
        "or": "55",
        "form": "3-6610",
        "sire": "Galileo Gold",
        "dam_sire": "Rock Of Gibraltar",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "45.5",
        "model_pct": "5.5%",
        "fair_odds": "18.33",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+0.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ran poorly at Thirsk on Saturday (6f) but he had earlier won a 5f handicap at Catterick in determined fashion; others appeal more."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Isla Bella",
        "jockey": "Alex Jary(3)",
        "trainer": "Joey Ramsden",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "67",
        "or": "47",
        "form": "487295",
        "sire": "Land Force",
        "dam_sire": "Elusive Quality",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "44.8",
        "model_pct": "5.1%",
        "fair_odds": "19.42",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Losing run stands at 17 but she has run some good races in defeat for Joey Ramsden and a strongly run race at this trip should see her to best effect; unraced on faster than good; each-way shout if the ground is no issue."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Beerwah (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Jason Hart",
        "trainer": "John & Sean Quinn",
        "ts": "61",
        "rpr": "66",
        "or": "55",
        "form": "56146-",
        "sire": "Mehmas",
        "dam_sire": "Kodiac",
        "stall": 15,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "44.6",
        "model_pct": "5.1%",
        "fair_odds": "19.69",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Off the mark at the 14th attempt when landing a 5f handicap at Beverley last September (soft) and ran well for fourth of 14 at Musselburgh one month later (good Topspeed figure); could progress further this year and he has shown promise on good to firm."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Anglesey Lad (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Kieran O'Neill",
        "trainer": "Scott Dixon",
        "ts": "60",
        "rpr": "62",
        "or": "46",
        "form": "3427-5",
        "sire": "Kodi Bear",
        "dam_sire": "Raven's Pass",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "43.5",
        "model_pct": "4.6%",
        "fair_odds": "21.81",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Still seeking his first win after 20 attempts but there have been several good runs along the way; recent return from a ten-month layoff should have sharpened him up and he holds each-way claims."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "Newyorkstateofmind (GB)",
        "jockey": "James Sullivan",
        "trainer": "Ruth Carr",
        "ts": "63",
        "rpr": "66",
        "or": "50",
        "form": "25570-",
        "sire": "Brazen Beau",
        "dam_sire": "Noverre",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "42.7",
        "model_pct": "4.3%",
        "fair_odds": "23.29",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+0.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Veteran with a better record on AW than turf; 5f on fast ground no problem for him and he has run well after an absence in the past (although not last year); good run wouldn't be a surprise but others appeal more for win purposes."
      },
      {
        "rank": 13,
        "horse": "Canaria Queen",
        "jockey": "Duran Fentiman",
        "trainer": "Tim Easterby",
        "ts": "59",
        "rpr": "65",
        "or": "55",
        "form": "2524-6",
        "sire": "Pastoral Pursuits",
        "dam_sire": "Compton Place",
        "stall": 13,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "42.2",
        "model_pct": "4.1%",
        "fair_odds": "24.20",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-2.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three 5f wins on turf last summer; on a competitive mark and she should come on for her recent return to action at Pontefract; seems to handle most ground; one to consider."
      },
      {
        "rank": 14,
        "horse": "Thank The Lord",
        "jockey": "Silvestre De Sousa",
        "trainer": "Gary Harrison",
        "ts": "56",
        "rpr": "64",
        "or": "51",
        "form": "2-8609",
        "sire": "Coach House",
        "dam_sire": "Avonbridge",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "41.6",
        "model_pct": "3.9%",
        "fair_odds": "25.66",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+0.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ended 2025 with two placed efforts on AW and he lines up here off a 6lb lower mark than when second at Newcastle in December; that is a result of four lesser efforts though and he now has a point to prove."
      },
      {
        "rank": 15,
        "horse": "Tilsworth Ony Ta",
        "jockey": "Jonny Peate",
        "trainer": "J R Jenkins",
        "ts": "47",
        "rpr": "61",
        "or": "46",
        "form": "8-8790",
        "sire": "Ardad",
        "dam_sire": "Statue Of Liberty",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "40.0",
        "model_pct": "3.4%",
        "fair_odds": "29.40",
        "best_dec": "81.00",
        "edge": "+2.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Five-time winner but he has been short of his best on AW this year and the return to turf made no difference at Bath 19 days ago; not a solid option."
      },
      {
        "rank": 16,
        "horse": "Lil Wade (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Tyler Heard",
        "trainer": "Scott Dixon",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "61",
        "or": "46",
        "form": "9885-9",
        "sire": "Dandy Man",
        "dam_sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "stall": 16,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "39.2",
        "model_pct": "3.2%",
        "fair_odds": "31.33",
        "best_dec": "81.00",
        "edge": "+2.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Good runs have been few and far between since his Wolverhampton second in September 2024; easy enough to swerve."
      },
      {
        "rank": 17,
        "horse": "Ziva's Star (GB)",
        "jockey": "Lewis Edmunds",
        "trainer": "Simon Whitaker",
        "ts": "55",
        "rpr": "61",
        "or": "46",
        "form": "39030-",
        "sire": "Territories",
        "dam_sire": "Teofilo",
        "stall": 17,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "38.3",
        "model_pct": "2.9%",
        "fair_odds": "34.00",
        "best_dec": "67.00",
        "edge": "+2.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-17 and just one handicap run that makes her of interest, namely her close third at Ripon last July; absent for 139 days and others have more pressing claims."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Sandown",
    "time": "13:50",
    "race_name": "bet365 Esher Cup Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 2",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Organise (GB)",
        "jockey": "James Doyle",
        "trainer": "John & Thady Gosden",
        "ts": "66",
        "rpr": "106",
        "or": "97",
        "form": "1-1",
        "sire": "Night Of Thunder",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "69.5",
        "model_pct": "27.9%",
        "fair_odds": "3.58",
        "best_dec": "2.20",
        "edge": "-23.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Impressive on debut at Southwell (7f, AW) last November and made it 2-2 in Yarmouth novice (1m, good) on recent reappearance; his inexperience was still evident last time and this well-bred colt could have lots more left in the tank for last year's winning yard; key player on handicap debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Look To The Stars (IRE)",
        "jockey": "William Buick",
        "trainer": "Charlie Appleby",
        "ts": "89",
        "rpr": "104",
        "or": "97",
        "form": "22116-",
        "sire": "Galiway",
        "dam_sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "64.8",
        "model_pct": "17.4%",
        "fair_odds": "5.75",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "+4.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won Kempton novice (7f, AW) last September on third start and followed up in warm conditions race at Newbury (1m, good to soft); failed to settle and didn't stay 1m2f in Group 3 Zetland Stakes at Newmarket last seen; wind op since and the hood could be a positive on reappearance; chance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Nobody Knows",
        "jockey": "Ryan Moore",
        "trainer": "Richard Hughes",
        "ts": "53",
        "rpr": "104",
        "or": "89",
        "form": "1-1",
        "sire": "Wootton Bassett",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "62.8",
        "model_pct": "14.1%",
        "fair_odds": "7.08",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-5.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Well-backed winner at Ayr (7f, soft) last September on sole 2yo start and made it 2-2 in Wolverhampton novice (8.6f, AW) last month, again doing it cosily; has potential off his opening mark and the booking of Ryan Moore is a bonus."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Laureate Crown",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Hugo Palmer",
        "ts": "87",
        "rpr": "109",
        "or": "93",
        "form": "1856-1",
        "sire": "Victor Ludorum",
        "dam_sire": "Dansili",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "61.6",
        "model_pct": "12.5%",
        "fair_odds": "8.00",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Didn't really kick on last year after winning at Ascot (7f, good to firm) on debut but he reappeared at Wolverhampton (8.6f, AW) last month having been gelded and defied a slow start to win by half a length; it was a small field but the clear runner-up finished second in a good handicap at Newmarket subsequently and this fellow may well be in the mix up 6lb."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Suspended Sentence (FR)",
        "jockey": "Hector Crouch",
        "trainer": "Michael Bell",
        "ts": "85",
        "rpr": "102",
        "or": "94",
        "form": "64114-",
        "sire": "Without Parole",
        "dam_sire": "Aqlaam",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "59.4",
        "model_pct": "10.1%",
        "fair_odds": "9.92",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+6.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won Ripon novice (1m, good to firm) last August on third start then followed up in four-runner nursery over this C&D (soft); creditable Listed fourth in France (1m, soft) in September but returns to a handicap off a mark 13lb higher than for his course win; further improvement needed."
      },
      {

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Improved upon first two runs (both on turf) to win at Southwell (7f, AW) last October, and followed up on handicap debut there (1m, AW); had just three rivals to beat last time and he's 12lb higher today with something to prove on turf, but is not discounted given the ease of that last win."

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won on debut at Salisbury (7f, good to firm) last June and kept on for fourth in Group 2 Vintage Stakes at Goodwood (7f, good) next time; ran okay in quality conditions race at Newbury (1m, good to soft) in September when last seen but he needs to prove he can cut it off this lofty mark."
      }
    ]
  },

  {
    "course": "Doncaster",
    "time": "14:15",
    "race_name": "Summer Saturday Series Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "7f",
    "going": "Good To Firm",
    "class": "Class 6",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Reginald Charles",
        "jockey": "P J McDonald",
        "trainer": "Geoff Oldroyd",
        "ts": "63",
        "rpr": "77",
        "or": "62",
        "form": "421-63",
        "sire": "Zoustar",
        "dam_sire": "Sleeping Indian",
        "stall": 16,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "53.9",
        "model_pct": "11.1%",
        "fair_odds": "9.05",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-0.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-16 on turf but he went mighty close at Redcar (good) in October; narrow winner at Southwell (also 7f, AW) on next start in December and it was a good effort when third to Wrydcroft over latter C&D last time; that did come after another two-month break but he's a player if backing it up 17 days on."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Pearly Squirrel",
        "jockey": "Daniel Muscutt",
        "trainer": "David Loughnane",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "76",
        "or": "63",
        "form": "-05133",
        "sire": "Kodi Bear",
        "dam_sire": "Azamour",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "52.2",
        "model_pct": "9.3%",
        "fair_odds": "10.78",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-0.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "C&D (good to firm; first-time cheekpieces) winner in July who also won 7f handicap (AW; no headgear) in March; missed the break (not for the first time) a fortnight ago but otherwise could have a say back on turf."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Clasina (GB)",
        "jockey": "NON-RUNNER",
        "trainer": "John Berry",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "64",
        "form": "85331-",
        "sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "dam_sire": "Bated Breath",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "50.9",
        "model_pct": "8.1%",
        "fair_odds": "12.28",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Attracted market interest on first go for John Berry and it was rewarded with a win at Yarmouth (7f, good to firm) in August; up 7lb and absent since so interesting to see how she goes in the market this time."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Ey Up He's A Star (GB)",
        "jockey": "David Nolan",
        "trainer": "Tony Coyle & Kaine Wood",
        "ts": "71",
        "rpr": "78",
        "or": "60",
        "form": "313-73",
        "sire": "Sogann",
        "dam_sire": "Hurricane Run",
        "stall": 17,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "50.7",
        "model_pct": "8.0%",
        "fair_odds": "12.49",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-11.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won at Newcastle (AW) in September and it was a close third at Thirsk (also 7f, good) on his return to turf a fortnight ago; drawn on the wing but can travel smoothly and should be in the thick of it off the same mark."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Wrydcroft",
        "jockey": "Rob Hornby",
        "trainer": "Pam Sly",
        "ts": "62",
        "rpr": "79",
        "or": "64",
        "form": "0118-1",
        "sire": "Territories",
        "dam_sire": "Teofilo",
        "stall": 15,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "49.8",
        "model_pct": "7.3%",
        "fair_odds": "13.63",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-12.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won three of his last four, comprising two wins at Leicester (good to soft) and an AW success at Southwell (also 7f) on this month's comeback; big field no bother and he has to be of interest under a 3lb nudge."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Born A Rebel (GB)",
        "jockey": "Jack Callan(3)",
        "trainer": "Patrick Owens",
        "ts": "65",
        "rpr": "75",
        "or": "65",
        "form": "7164-7",
        "sire": "Outstrip",
        "dam_sire": "Cockney Rebel",
        "stall": 14,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "49.5",
        "model_pct": "7.1%",
        "fair_odds": "14.00",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+2.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Can miss the break but scored twice last year, a 20-1 win at Newmarket (good to firm) in July supplemented by a Yarmouth (also 7f, good to soft) success in September; never dangerous on AW return in February but might do better this time."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Finn Ironside (GB)",
        "jockey": "Hollie Doyle",
        "trainer": "Ivan Furtado",
        "ts": "64",
        "rpr": "78",
        "or": "63",
        "form": "00-904",
        "sire": "Due Diligence",
        "dam_sire": "Lawman",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "49.1",
        "model_pct": "6.9%",
        "fair_odds": "14.52",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-3.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made virtually all in big-field York handicap (good to firm) in 2024; C&D (good to soft; first-time tongue-tie) and AW (also 7f) winner last summer; lesser efforts followed until a firm step back in the right direction last time and returns to turf from a handy mark; respected."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Pianoforte",
        "jockey": "Daniel Tudhope",
        "trainer": "Julie Camacho",
        "ts": "74",
        "rpr": "75",
        "or": "65",
        "form": "4-7956",
        "sire": "Land Force",
        "dam_sire": "Dutch Art",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "49.0",
        "model_pct": "6.8%",
        "fair_odds": "14.77",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+0.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Got up late to win Bath novice (5f, good to firm) for Andrew Balding in June; 0-9 for this yard (majority 6f, turf/AW) and first-time cheekpieces (removed) didn't spark an improved effort last time; career-low mark and second go at this trip (first is easily excused) the straws to clutch at."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Onemorenomore (GB)",
        "jockey": "Cieren Fallon",
        "trainer": "Philip McBride",
        "ts": "69",
        "rpr": "78",
        "or": "60",
        "form": "7174-5",
        "sire": "Mukhadram",
        "dam_sire": "Bartok I",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "45.7",
        "model_pct": "4.9%",
        "fair_odds": "20.39",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-3.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Good record here with three wins including a division of this (soft; acts on good/good to firm) in 2024; cashed in on reduced mark to open AW account over 7f in November and just 1lb higher on this return to turf after three months away; possibilities."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Giant",
        "jockey": "Joanna Mason",
        "trainer": "Ian Williams",
        "ts": "67",
        "rpr": "78",
        "or": "63",
        "form": "680-63",
        "sire": "Rajasinghe",
        "dam_sire": "Kodiac",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "45.6",
        "model_pct": "4.9%",
        "fair_odds": "20.59",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "-6.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three wins (7f/1m, all AW) and it was a good effort when third in Southwell series final (1m, AW) 17 days ago; having a rare foray on grass but did finish second in good-ground Chester handicap (6f) in September; not dismissed from his lower turf mark."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Yafaarr",
        "jockey": "George Wood",
        "trainer": "Sam England",
        "ts": "66",
        "rpr": "75",
        "or": "65",
        "form": "3123-7",
        "sire": "Blue Point",
        "dam_sire": "Elusive City",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "45.0",
        "model_pct": "4.6%",
        "fair_odds": "21.83",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "-0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "In decent nick on AW for this yard since August, in the frame all seven starts and scoring at Newcastle (1m) in October; looked rusty on his turf reappearance a fortnight ago but he's a candidate to build on that; first-time tongue-tie."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "Singoura",
        "jockey": "Jack Mitchell",
        "trainer": "Gemma Tutty",
        "ts": "71",
        "rpr": "74",
        "or": "64",
        "form": "456-08",
        "sire": "Rajasinghe",
        "dam_sire": "Green Desert",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "44.8",
        "model_pct": "4.5%",
        "fair_odds": "22.37",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-3.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "1-2 (AW) as a juvenile and although winless last term her best efforts both came over C&D (good to firm); midfield finish (C&D, good to soft) after two-month break wasn't devoid of promise last time; interesting."
      },
      {
        "rank": 13,
        "horse": "Mecca's Symphony (GB)",
        "jockey": "Connor Beasley",
        "trainer": "Michael Dods",
        "ts": "41",
        "rpr": "74",
        "or": "64",
        "form": "35/37-",
        "sire": "Sergei Prokofiev",
        "dam_sire": "Kyllachy",
        "stall": 13,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "42.6",
        "model_pct": "3.6%",
        "fair_odds": "27.83",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "-0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Six-race maiden whose reappearance third over C&D (good to firm) contained promise on this card last year; just one run subsequently and she's been off since wind surgery in June; unexposed and drops in grade for this comeback; needs considering, particularly if gaining market traction."
      },
      {
        "rank": 14,
        "horse": "Sir David",
        "jockey": "Rowan Scott",
        "trainer": "Nigel Tinkler",
        "ts": "74",
        "rpr": "74",
        "or": "64",
        "form": "6149-0",
        "sire": "Mehmas",
        "dam_sire": "Kodiac",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "42.4",
        "model_pct": "3.5%",
        "fair_odds": "28.33",
        "best_dec": "23.00",
        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Came good for Stella Barclay with last-gasp win at Carlisle (7f, good) in August but signed off for that yard with big soft-ground defeat the following month; no immediate encouragement on stable debut a fortnight ago."
      },
      {
        "rank": 15,
        "horse": "Yehudi",
        "jockey": "Hope Regan(7)",
        "trainer": "Mark Loughnane",
        "ts": "55",
        "rpr": "77",
        "or": "60",

        "dam_sire": "Sepoy",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "41.8",

        "fair_odds": "30.11",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-16 (includes turf) but has gone close a couple of times on AW; wore this headgear combination when fourth at Wolverhampton (8.5f, AW) under Hope Regan three weeks ago."
      },
      {
        "rank": 16,
        "horse": "Ziggy's Angel",
        "jockey": "Oisin Orr",
        "trainer": "Richard & Peter Fahey",
        "ts": "44",
        "rpr": "76",
        "or": "64",
        "form": "1538-5",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Refuse To Bend",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "41.2",
        "model_pct": "3.1%",
        "fair_odds": "31.73",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-2.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Improved for the switch to handicaps when winning at Newcastle (7f) in September and bettered that form when third over 6f at Southwell (also AW) in November; had wind surgery before respectable comeback over latter C&D one month ago; unexposed on turf and worth a second look."
      },
      {
        "rank": 17,
        "horse": "The New Bay Pearl (GB)",
        "jockey": "Lewis Edmunds",
        "trainer": "Simon Whitaker",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "76",
        "or": "64",
        "form": "73056-",
        "sire": "New Bay",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "40.7",
        "model_pct": "3.0%",
        "fair_odds": "33.53",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-8 for Roger Varian but displayed clear ability on AW (tailed off on sole turf start) while also lacking consistency; sold for 5,000gns in December and wind surgery swiftly followed; market might help on this reappearance/stable debut."
      }
    ]
  },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Beaten favourite in Listed race at Goodwood on last appearance but was far from disgraced, especially as he could have done with a stronger pace; progressive otherwise and landed a notable handicap at Newbury (good to firm) prior to following up over C&D (soft); remains of major interest."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Almeric (GB)",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "115",
        "rpr": "133",

        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "66.8",
        "model_pct": "24.5%",
        "fair_odds": "4.09",
        "best_dec": "2.63",
        "edge": "-17.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Record is 3-5; has gained all wins, including two Listed races, in his starts on softer than good but may yet show that he's fully effective on faster ground; drops back in class having been comfortably held in the Champion Stakes; top on the figures and he was progressive before that latest start."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "King Of Cities (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Ryan Moore",
        "trainer": "K R Burke",
        "ts": "113",

        "dam_sire": "Teofilo",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "66.0",
        "model_pct": "22.3%",
        "fair_odds": "4.49",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Formerly trained by Richard Hannon but remained with same owner; produced his best performance in most recent domestic start, namely a narrow success in Group 3 at last year's Ebor festival at York (1m1f, good to firm); may have more to offer this term; respected."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Devil's Advocate",
        "jockey": "William Buick",
        "trainer": "John & Thady Gosden",
        "ts": "113",
        "rpr": "125",
        "or": "112",
        "form": "0417-2",

        "dam_sire": "Nathaniel",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "60.8",
        "model_pct": "11.9%",
        "fair_odds": "8.43",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Highlight last season was a very useful performance in 1m2f handicap at Doncaster, suggesting he's verging on Group class; creditable second, despite usual cheekpieces being removed, in AW Listed event at Kempton on reappearance; possibilities with the headgear back on."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Muddy Mooy",
        "jockey": "Edward Greatrex",
        "trainer": "Charlie Pike",
        "ts": "94",
        "rpr": "119",
        "or": "100",
        "form": "4742-3",

        "dam_sire": "Kalanisi",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "53.8",
        "model_pct": "5.2%",
        "fair_odds": "19.29",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+1.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has gained both wins on AW and she did well to finish third, in difficult circumstances, at Kempton (1m2f Listed) on reappearance; ties in with Devil's Advocate on that bare form but isn't guaranteed to find the required further improvement back on turf."
      }
    ]
  },

  {
    "course": "Doncaster",

    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Moreedd",
        "jockey": "Callum Rodriguez",
        "trainer": "Roger Varian",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Night Of Thunder",
        "dam_sire": "Selkirk",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "56.6",
        "model_pct": "25.2%",
        "fair_odds": "3.96",
        "best_dec": "2.10",
        "edge": "-27.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Top-class pedigree, closely related to three winners, notably Group 1 winner Benbatl (RPR 124) and a half-brother to three other winners including 1000 Guineas heroine Elmalka (113); dam a Grade/Group 1 winner over 1m2f (118); five of those six winning siblings were successful first time out; of obvious interest."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Deported",
        "jockey": "Daniel Tudhope",
        "trainer": "Ollie Sangster",
        "ts": "-",

        "dam_sire": "Zoffany",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "55.8",
        "model_pct": "23.5%",
        "fair_odds": "4.26",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "+0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Free-going sort; has shown a fair level of ability in his four starts and has the strongest form on offer; could do with settling better though and appears vulnerable to anything progressive."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Bunyola Bay (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Sean Levey",

        "ts": "31",

        "best_dec": "3.75",
        "edge": "-8.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Finished third of eight, beaten 3l, when the well-backed favourite for a 6.5f maiden at Newbury last October (soft; winner has since finished fourth in the Greenham); could see his race out more strongly on the sounder surface; big player."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,

        "jockey": "Jason Hart",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",

        "dam_sire": "Haatef",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-7",

        "fair_odds": "7.36",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "+4.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "240,000gns yearling; second foal of an 8.6f/1m3f winner (including US; RPR 98), herself a half-sister to winners Gifts Of Gold (smart 1m1f-1m7f) and Dusky Queen (7f Listed); appealing pedigree and no surprise to see him play a part on debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,

        "ts": "-",

        "edge": "+10.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Fetched 55,000gns as a foal and 45,000gns as a yearling but went through the ring for just 1,000gns last October; second foal; half-brother to Canadian 7f AW winner Vrana; dam French Listed-placed 6.5f 2yo winner (RPR 90); likely best watched on debut."

      }
    ]

  {
    "course": "Sandown",
    "time": "15:00",
    "race_name": "bet365 Mile (Group 2)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 1",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Field Of Gold (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Colin Keane",
        "trainer": "John & Thady Gosden",
        "ts": "123",
        "rpr": "139",
        "or": "125",
        "form": "21145-",

        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-3",

        "fair_odds": "3.40",
        "best_dec": "2.00",
        "edge": "-22.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Very progressive until having plausible excuses in the Sussex Stakes (found to be lame) and QEII (draw to some extent) in last two appearances; impressive wins in the Irish 2,000 Guineas and St James's Palace Stakes make him the one to beat, provided he's back in similar form."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Zeus Olympios (GB)",
        "jockey": "Ryan Moore",
        "trainer": "K R Burke",
        "ts": "91",
        "rpr": "129",
        "or": "120",
        "form": "1111-",
        "sire": "Night Of Thunder",
        "dam_sire": "Siyouni",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "71.2",
        "model_pct": "24.5%",
        "fair_odds": "4.08",
        "best_dec": "4.00",
        "edge": "-4.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Highly progressive in his first campaign last year and still unbeaten (4-4); won going away from Opera Ballo in Group 2 at Newmarket (1m, good to firm) on final start; remains one to follow and has the makings of a Group 1 colt this term; commands respect."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Opera Ballo (IRE)",
        "jockey": "William Buick",
        "trainer": "Charlie Appleby",
        "ts": "118",
        "rpr": "127",
        "or": "119",
        "form": "1121-1",
        "sire": "Ghaiyyath",
        "dam_sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "70.9",
        "model_pct": "23.7%",
        "fair_odds": "4.21",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "+10.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Progressive colt who readily bagged Group 1 honours at Meydan (1m1f, good) three months ago, taking record to 6-8; however, appears to need further improvement to defy 5lb penalty and was no match for Zeus Olympios in last domestic outing."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Never So Brave (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "119",
        "rpr": "131",
        "or": "116",
        "form": "21117-",
        "sire": "No Nay Never",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "65.1",
        "model_pct": "10.8%",
        "fair_odds": "9.28",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "+1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Did very well (3-5) last season for new stable, completing a notable summer hat-trick (7f/1m, good to firm) that culminated in Group 1 success at York; not disgraced from unfavourable draw in the QEII on final outing; may rate higher still and looks likely to go well."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Cicero's Gift (GB)",
        "jockey": "Jason Watson",
        "trainer": "Charles Hills",
        "ts": "113",
        "rpr": "127",
        "or": "119",
        "form": "62211-",
        "sire": "Muhaarar",
        "dam_sire": "Diktat",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "61.9",
        "model_pct": "7.0%",
        "fair_odds": "14.38",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+2.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Dual C&D winner who finished third in this race last year; returns to Sandown but may be flattered by his new rating, having been perhaps helped by the draw when registering a 100-1 success in the Group 1 QEII at Ascot (good) on last appearance; needs to prove he can back up that form."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Dancing Gemini (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "Roger Teal",
        "ts": "115",
        "rpr": "132",
        "or": "118",
        "form": "28390-",
        "sire": "Camelot",
        "dam_sire": "Australia",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "58.9",
        "model_pct": "4.6%",
        "fair_odds": "21.82",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-2.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Below best in three of his last four outings in 2025 but commenced the campaign splendidly, winning twice (including in this race) then going close in the Group 1 Lockinge; while today may be a good time to catch him, he faces a slightly stiffer assignment in this field."
      }
    ]
  },

  {
    "course": "Doncaster",
    "time": "15:25",
    "race_name": "Free Bets On attheraces.com Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m",
    "going": "Good To Firm",
    "class": "Class 5",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Welbury",
        "jockey": "Callum Rodriguez",
        "trainer": "Edward Bethell",
        "ts": "64",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "72",
        "form": "35-1",
        "sire": "Ardad",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "61.6",
        "model_pct": "25.4%",
        "fair_odds": "3.94",
        "best_dec": "2.88",
        "edge": "-14.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Well on top at the finish of a 1m novice at Southwell on his seasonal return five weeks ago; that was his first attempt at the trip and he moves into handicaps with potential and his stable going well."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Silver State (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Rose Dawes(5)",
        "trainer": "Jack Channon",
        "ts": "69",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "80",
        "form": "811331",
        "sire": "Lucky Vega",
        "dam_sire": "Sadler's Wells",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "10-1",
        "score": "61.0",
        "model_pct": "24.1%",
        "fair_odds": "4.15",
        "best_dec": "3.75",
        "edge": "-6.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "He made an instant impact once handicapping in a visor, winning over 8.6f at Wolverhampton in February and following up over 1m at Newcastle 11 days later; back on the up with an emphatic front-running success at Bath last week (1m, good to soft) and he is 2lb well in under a 6lb penalty; faster ground to contend with today but this will be his last chance in a Class 5 for a while and he has to be high on the list."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Toastmaster (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Harry Davies",
        "trainer": "Simon & Ed Crisford",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "74",
        "form": "542-23",
        "sire": "Cotai Glory",
        "dam_sire": "Acclamation",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "57.1",
        "model_pct": "17.7%",
        "fair_odds": "5.65",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Seeking his first win but he has run well in defeat in all three handicap starts (9.4f-1m3f); drops back to 1m today and he could still have a bit more to offer."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Saxophonist (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Daniel Tudhope",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "29",
        "rpr": "79",
        "or": "74",
        "form": "383-",
        "sire": "Saxon Warrior",
        "dam_sire": "Machiavellian",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "51.8",
        "model_pct": "11.7%",
        "fair_odds": "8.56",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "+1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two third-place finishes last season, both over 7f on AW; bred to be useful and market support would look significant on this seasonal and handicap debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Booziebrunch",
        "jockey": "Daniel Muscutt",
        "trainer": "S Woods",
        "ts": "54",
        "rpr": "82",
        "or": "73",
        "form": "3120-2",
        "sire": "Coulsty",
        "dam_sire": "Bushranger",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "47.9",
        "model_pct": "8.6%",
        "fair_odds": "11.63",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "-6.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Stepped up on his 2yo efforts when finishing second to a handicap blot at Southwell three weeks ago (1m); should give his running but perhaps vulnerable to less-exposed sorts."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Tarmonbarry Kid (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Oisin Orr",
        "trainer": "Richard & Peter Fahey",
        "ts": "62",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "67",
        "form": "535-",
        "sire": "Sioux Nation",
        "dam_sire": "Canford Cliffs",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "46.6",
        "model_pct": "7.8%",
        "fair_odds": "12.84",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+0.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Promising debut at Chester last July (7f, good; form worked out); no progress in two 7f runs at Newcastle afterwards but he has been gelded prior to his handicap/seasonal debut and stepping up to 1m should suit; one to be interested in."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Attention Seeker",
        "jockey": "Cam Hardie",
        "trainer": "Brian Ellison",
        "ts": "67",
        "rpr": "74",
        "or": "61",
        "form": "46-770",
        "sire": "Cotai Glory",
        "dam_sire": "Hector Protector",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "8-10",
        "score": "40.4",
        "model_pct": "4.8%",
        "fair_odds": "21.06",
        "best_dec": "51.00",
        "edge": "+2.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Free-going sort; not matched 2yo form (for Harry Eustace) in three runs for new connections and he looked a hard ride at Wolverhampton last month, hanging badly right throughout; risky on the back of that."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Sandown",
    "time": "15:35",
    "race_name": "bet365 Classic Trial (Group 3)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m2f",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 1",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Action (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Ryan Moore",
        "trainer": "A P O'Brien",
        "ts": "122",
        "rpr": "126",
        "or": "115",
        "form": "3132-",
        "sire": "Frankel",
        "dam_sire": "Scat Daddy",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "68.2",
        "model_pct": "27.9%",
        "fair_odds": "3.59",
        "best_dec": "2.00",
        "edge": "-27.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Closely related to last year's Derby winner Lambourn and has his own Epsom aspirations, having ended a progressive 2yo campaign with close second to one of his stablemates in the Group 1 Futurity at Doncaster (1m, heavy); now goes in tongue-tie; the pick on the figures and may well rate higher still."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Al Zanati (GB)",
        "jockey": "William Buick",
        "trainer": "Charlie Appleby",
        "ts": "95",
        "rpr": "114",
        "or": "106",
        "form": "121-",
        "sire": "Dubawi",
        "dam_sire": "Scat Daddy",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "67.6",
        "model_pct": "25.8%",
        "fair_odds": "3.88",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "+8.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Dubawi colt who got up in the final strides to win 1m1f AW Group 3 at Chantilly on final 2yo start, taking record to 2-3; looks likely to be well suited by going up further in distance; doesn't have a Derby entry but further progress may materialise."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Wise Prince (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Robert Havlin",
        "trainer": "John & Thady Gosden",
        "ts": "43",
        "rpr": "104",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "1-",
        "sire": "Ghaiyyath",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "64.9",
        "model_pct": "18.0%",
        "fair_odds": "5.56",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ghaiyyath colt whose two major entries include the Derby; scored comfortably at Nottingham (1m, good to soft) in sole 2yo start, looking the type who'll be suited by middle distances and could develop into a Group performer this year; interesting contender."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Raaheeb (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "Owen Burrows",
        "ts": "82",
        "rpr": "105",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "1-",
        "sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "dam_sire": "Kingmambo",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "61.0",
        "model_pct": "10.5%",
        "fair_odds": "9.48",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-6.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Smartly bred, being a brother to Baaeed and Hukum; duly showed strong promise in justifying favouritism at Ascot (7f, soft) in sole 2yo outing; held a Royal Lodge entry at the time and currently holds three major entries, including the Derby; should be suited by middle distances; bright prospect."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Spyce (GB)",
        "jockey": "Tom Marquand",
        "trainer": "Alan King",
        "ts": "96",
        "rpr": "108",
        "or": "100",
        "form": "214-",
        "sire": "Too Darn Hot",
        "dam_sire": "Pastoral Pursuits",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "59.0",
        "model_pct": "8.1%",
        "fair_odds": "12.41",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+1.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Eye-catching second in the Convivial Maiden at York then went one better at Yarmouth and ran well in Group 3 at Newmarket (1m2f, good to firm) upped further in trip; developing into a useful Flat performer for his esteemed dual-purpose trainer."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Winding Stream",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Richard Hughes",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "96",
        "or": "85",
        "form": "1-2",
        "sire": "Almanzor",
        "dam_sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "55.3",
        "model_pct": "4.9%",
        "fair_odds": "20.33",
        "best_dec": "81.00",
        "edge": "+3.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Both starts on AW, scoring comfortably at Southwell (7f) as a 2yo then running well under a penalty at Kempton (1m); holds a Derby entry and may be suited by going up further in distance today but faces a stiff task at this level; bottom on bare figures."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Oceans Four (GB)",
        "jockey": "Joe Leavy",
        "trainer": "Brian Meehan",
        "ts": "107",
        "rpr": "117",
        "or": "106",
        "form": "9131-",
        "sire": "Zoustar",
        "dam_sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "55.1",
        "model_pct": "4.9%",
        "fair_odds": "20.63",
        "best_dec": "41.00",
        "edge": "+1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Narrowly bagged Group 3 honours at Chantilly (1m, soft) in September when last seen but still needs to prove he can repeat the clear peak form he appeared to show when going close at 25-1 in an exciting Solario at Sandown; gelding who has no major entries in the future."
      }
    ]
  },

  {
    "course": "Doncaster",
    "time": "16:00",
    "race_name": "Sky Sports Racing Virgin 512 Fillies' Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m2f",
    "going": "Good To Firm",
    "class": "Class 5",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Percy's Daydream (GB)",
        "jockey": "Daniel Tudhope",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "71",
        "rpr": "78",
        "or": "74",
        "form": "32125-",
        "sire": "Sir Percy",
        "dam_sire": "Aqlaam",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "10-2",
        "score": "60.2",
        "model_pct": "31.9%",
        "fair_odds": "3.14",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "+4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Progressive as a 3yo, winning at Lingfield (1m2f, good to firm) and Leicester (1m4f, good); below par on her final start in 2025 but she reportedly boiled over in the preliminaries; still has low mileage; market useful with the stable also running Myrrh."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Myrrh (GB)",
        "jockey": "Mark Winn",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "38",
        "rpr": "76",
        "or": "71",
        "form": "313-",
        "sire": "Ulysses",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "8-10",
        "score": "53.4",
        "model_pct": "12.5%",
        "fair_odds": "7.99",
        "best_dec": "4.33",
        "edge": "-10.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Improved her RPR with each of her three 2yo runs, winning at Hamilton in September (8.3f, soft; second past the post) and running well for third at Kempton one month later (1m; penalised); some encouragement for 1m2f on pedigree; stable also run Percy's Daydream."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Oh Yes You Do (FR)",
        "jockey": "Saffie Osborne",
        "trainer": "David Menuisier",
        "ts": "44",
        "rpr": "78",
        "or": "69",
        "form": "41-",
        "sire": "Zarak",
        "dam_sire": "Elusive Quality",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "8-8",
        "score": "53.2",
        "model_pct": "12.3%",
        "fair_odds": "8.16",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-9.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Had subsequent winners back in second and third when scoring at Leicester in October (1m, good to soft), her second start; still looked to be learning her job there and she is open to further progress this year; 1m2f seems likely to suit her well; strong contender."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Ablon (FR)",
        "jockey": "Sean Levey",
        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "15",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "69",
        "form": "55-21",
        "sire": "Le Havre",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-11",
        "score": "52.5",
        "model_pct": "11.1%",
        "fair_odds": "9.05",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two improved efforts this year, runner-up at Kempton (1m) in February before making all in a 7f novice back at Kempton two weeks later; bred to stay this longer trip well and her best days could still be ahead of her."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Nanny Park (GB)",
        "jockey": "Jonny Peate",
        "trainer": "Sara Ender",
        "ts": "64",
        "rpr": "77",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "53333-",
        "sire": "Golden Horn",
        "dam_sire": "Exceed And Excel",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-10",
        "score": "50.5",
        "model_pct": "8.5%",
        "fair_odds": "11.80",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "1m AW win as a 2yo; consistent last year without looking ahead of her mark; sold out of James Fanshawe's stable for 18,000gns in October; she will need to be at the top of her game to make a winning stable debut after 193 days off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Saliko (GB)",
        "jockey": "Lewis Edmunds",
        "trainer": "Jack Jones",
        "ts": "67",
        "rpr": "80",
        "or": "71",
        "form": "11460-",
        "sire": "Kameko",
        "dam_sire": "Linamix",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-13",
        "score": "49.5",
        "model_pct": "7.4%",
        "fair_odds": "13.56",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+0.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won twice at Nottingham last July (1m2f, good and good to soft); just 1lb higher than for the second of those victories but she ended 2025 with a poor run and may not want the ground too lively."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Little Miss India",
        "jockey": "Paddy Bradley",
        "trainer": "James Owen",
        "ts": "46",
        "rpr": "78",
        "or": "71",
        "form": "721418",
        "sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-13",
        "score": "48.6",
        "model_pct": "6.5%",
        "fair_odds": "15.33",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-2.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Often slowly away but it hasn't prevented her from winning three times on the AW since October (9.4f-1m4f); this trip more suitable than the 1m she tackled at Bath 19 days ago; untried on faster than good."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Alkumatic Jo Jo (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Silvestre De Sousa",
        "trainer": "Ivan Furtado",
        "ts": "54",
        "rpr": "72",
        "or": "69",
        "form": "3432-5",
        "sire": "Alkumait",
        "dam_sire": "Dawn Approach",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "8-8",
        "score": "48.6",
        "model_pct": "6.5%",
        "fair_odds": "15.38",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "-7.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "In the frame in her four 2yo runs (7f-1m); only midfield on her seasonal debut 12 days ago but stepping up in trip could spark something extraa."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Finally Escaped",
        "jockey": "George Wood",
        "trainer": "Roger Fell",
        "ts": "50",

        "sire": "Mohaather",
        "dam_sire": "Clodovil",

        "weight": "8-11",
        "score": "44.0",
        "model_pct": "3.4%",
        "fair_odds": "29.22",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-6.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Fitted with headgear for the first time at Thirsk two weeks ago (1m, good; turf debut) and ran her best race so far, keeping on for a never-dangerous sixth of 13 (beaten 3.75l); should stay this trip and she is open to further progress."
      }
    ]
  },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Signs of ability in two runs for Dermot Weld last summer (7f, yielding/1m, AW); gelded and sold for 20,000euros in November; bred to do much better and he makes his return with his new stable going well; he's an interesting 3yo but the drop to 6f isn't sure to suit on paper; betting should guide."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Promising third last year on first two starts (1m, good/soft) then won Haydock maiden (1m, good to soft) in September; his dam was a 1m2f/1m4f winner and it seems likely that he'll improve for this step up in trip on handicap/seasonal debut; trainer won this in 2024."

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Took a step forward when up in trip and third at Newbury (1m, soft) last October on his third start; ran well on good ground on debut; there's stamina in his pedigree and he's a possible improver on this first handicap start."

  {
    "course": "Cork",
    "time": "17:05",
    "race_name": "Welcome To Cork Racecourse Mallow Maiden",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m",
    "going": "Yielding",
    "class": "Class 3",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Suspicious Mindz (GB)",
        "jockey": "Shane Foley",
        "trainer": "Mrs John Harrington",
        "ts": "61",
        "rpr": "95",
        "or": "87",
        "form": "8353-",
        "sire": "Bated Breath",
        "dam_sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "57.7",
        "model_pct": "19.5%",
        "fair_odds": "5.13",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "+2.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Best effort a close third in Listed heat at Tipperary (7.5f, good; dual Group 1 runner-up Brussels second); poor effort next time on soft at Roscommon; gelded ahead of 7f Dundalk maiden third in October; big player on return with drying ground in his favour."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Nil Bua Gan Dua (USA)",
        "jockey": "J M Sheridan",
        "trainer": "Joseph Patrick O'Brien",
        "ts": "87",
        "rpr": "93",
        "or": "101",
        "form": "435-",
        "sire": "American Pharoah",
        "dam_sire": "Noble Mission",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "56.0",
        "model_pct": "17.4%",
        "fair_odds": "5.75",
        "best_dec": "2.63",
        "edge": "-19.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Second runner for yard; promise when fourth on debut at the Curragh; not disgraced in 1m Leopardstown Group 2 on second start; ran to similar level when beaten 6l behind smart Ballydoyle colt in 1m1f Leopardstown Group 3; fair chance with sights lowered on return; holds Irish Derby entry."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Tashakour",
        "jockey": "Ben Coen",
        "trainer": "J P Murtagh",
        "ts": "80",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "67-2",
        "sire": "Night Of Thunder",
        "dam_sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "55.0",
        "model_pct": "16.2%",
        "fair_odds": "6.19",
        "best_dec": "2.63",
        "edge": "-22.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made encouraging Curragh debut last July, staying on late over 7f; failed to improve over same C&D following month; best effort yet when runner-up to Ballydoyle colt at Navan (1m) on return last month but that was on heavy; has race-fitness on his side."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Coasting",
        "jockey": "Luke McAteer",
        "trainer": "David Marnane",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "76",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "4",
        "sire": "Bated Breath",
        "dam_sire": "Elusive Quality",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "50.8",
        "model_pct": "12.0%",
        "fair_odds": "8.32",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+6.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Bated Breath gelding cost 20,000euros; went modest fourth behind stablemate and favourite Allsortz over 6f on debut at Dundalk a fortnight ago; bred to appreciate the step up in trip on turf debut; in the mix."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Oust (GB)",
        "jockey": "Seamie Heffernan",
        "trainer": "Josh Halley",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "72",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "4-",
        "sire": "Palace Pier",
        "dam_sire": "Frankel",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "48.7",
        "model_pct": "10.3%",
        "fair_odds": "9.66",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+6.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Palace Pier colt cost 40,000euros; backed in from big prices (sent off 10-1) when 8l fourth of seven on 7f Dundalk debut in December; will need to improve significantly to take this."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Fallacy (USA)",
        "jockey": "Andrew Slattery",
        "trainer": "Andrew Slattery",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "72",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "96-",
        "sire": "Blame",
        "dam_sire": "Empire Maker",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "47.9",
        "model_pct": "9.8%",
        "fair_odds": "10.21",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+5.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Bred for the AW but didn't show a whole pile on 1m Dundalk debut in October although bit better over same C&D when sixth of 14 in December; gelded; turf debut; stable in form."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Chamonix",
        "jockey": "Declan McDonogh",
        "trainer": "Joseph Patrick O'Brien",
        "ts": "14",
        "rpr": "75",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "5",
        "sire": "Wootton Bassett",
        "dam_sire": "Danehill Dancer",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "47.7",
        "model_pct": "9.7%",
        "fair_odds": "10.35",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "+0.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Son of Wootton Bassett cost 100,000euros as a yearling; weak in the betting on debut (20-1) when fifth of eight at the Curragh (1m1f, soft to heavy) three weeks ago; beaten only 3.75l and improvement can be expected."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Roaming Coyote (IRE)",
        "jockey": "W J Lee",
        "trainer": "Kevin Thomas Coleman",
        "ts": "19",
        "rpr": "44",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "0-",
        "sire": "Awtaad",
        "dam_sire": "Dragon Pulse",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "38.8",
        "model_pct": "5.1%",
        "fair_odds": "19.43",
        "best_dec": "101.00",
        "edge": "+4.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Triple-figure odds and never a factor on 1m Curragh debut in October; safe to look elsewhere."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Doncaster",
    "time": "17:10",
    "race_name": "Sky Sports Racing Sky 415 Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m2f",
    "going": "Good To Firm",
    "class": "Class 5",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Kiss For An Angel (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Shane Gray",
        "trainer": "Richard & Peter Fahey",
        "ts": "60",
        "rpr": "75",
        "or": "69",
        "form": "2552-",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Kingman",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "54.8",
        "model_pct": "24.4%",
        "fair_odds": "4.10",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-1.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Tapped back into his initial promise when close second of five in Redcar nursery (1m, good) in November; gelded ahead of this comeback and he's another whose pedigree suggests this trip can unlock more."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Cotton Bud (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Daniel Tudhope",
        "trainer": "Shaun Lycett",
        "ts": "47",
        "rpr": "72",
        "or": "69",
        "form": "5442-",
        "sire": "Cloth Of Stars",
        "dam_sire": "Dansili",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "51.3",
        "model_pct": "13.2%",
        "fair_odds": "7.58",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Steady progression in four starts for Kevin Philippart De Foy and left that yard for \u00a326,000gns after finishing second in Nottingham nursery (about 1m, good) in October; new trip a positive on pedigree and market should help on this reappearance and stable debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Berkshire Schmokin",
        "jockey": "P J McDonald",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "30",
        "rpr": "77",
        "or": "66",
        "form": "7-4145",
        "sire": "War Of Will",
        "dam_sire": "Kitten's Joy",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "50.7",
        "model_pct": "11.9%",
        "fair_odds": "8.41",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two turf starts last year; made the breakthrough in his second handicap when scoring at Wolverhampton (9.5f, AW) in February; yet to build on that, however, and others arguably have more scope for improvement on this switch back to grass."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Claytons Kolatonic",
        "jockey": "NON-RUNNER",
        "trainer": "Dominic Ffrench Davis",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "70",
        "or": "63",
        "form": "634",
        "sire": "Tasleet",
        "dam_sire": "Helmet",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "50.2",
        "model_pct": "11.0%",
        "fair_odds": "9.13",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "200-1 but it was his best effort when fourth at Kempton (1m, AW) at the start of this month; mixed messages on pedigree for this trip but he can't be ruled out on turf/handicap debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Tommo's Ginjaninja",
        "jockey": "Joanna Mason",
        "trainer": "Michael & David Easterby",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "76",
        "or": "67",
        "form": "2352",
