        "dam_sire": "Raven's Pass",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "49.1",
        "model_pct": "9.0%",
        "fair_odds": "11.10",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "+4.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Showed improvement when second at Southwell (1m, AW) in March; interesting to see if he can build on that up in trip for this turf and handicap debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Brave Leader (GB)",
        "jockey": "Sean Levey",
        "trainer": "Tom Ward",
        "ts": "42",
        "rpr": "74",

        "dam_sire": "Dansili",
        "stall": 10,

        "fair_odds": "11.64",
        "best_dec": "3.00",
        "edge": "-26.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Steady improvement in three qualifying runs around 1m (good/AW) last year; pedigree a pointer to him doing better over this longer trip on handicap debut/reappearance; has been gelded."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,

        "spotlight": "Narrowly recorded his best effort when staying on for third on return at Chelmsford (1m2f, AW) last month; brings potential to this handicap debut with turf no problem on pedigree."

  {
    "course": "Cork",
    "time": "17:40",
    "race_name": "Irish Stallion Farms EBF Median Auction Race",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m",
    "going": "Yielding",
    "class": "Class 3",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "The Publican's Son (USA)",
        "jockey": "J M Sheridan",
        "trainer": "Joseph Patrick O'Brien",
        "ts": "87",
        "rpr": "108",
        "or": "102",
        "form": "28-5",
        "sire": "Beau Liam",
        "dam_sire": "War Chant",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "58.9",
        "model_pct": "21.3%",
        "fair_odds": "4.69",
        "best_dec": "1.91",
        "edge": "-34.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Belied 40-1 odds with strong-finishing second in Curragh Group 3 (6f, good to yielding) where he was the sole newcomer in the field; inexperience costly when in rear in the Middle Park; slowly away when respectable fifth in Leopardstown Group 3 on return 12 days ago; bred to get the mile and could be a class apart."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Echo Of Faith (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Shane Foley",
        "trainer": "Mrs John Harrington",
        "ts": "84",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "81",
        "form": "841-8",
        "sire": "Lucky Vega",
        "dam_sire": "Lawman",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-10",
        "score": "54.4",
        "model_pct": "13.8%",
        "fair_odds": "7.24",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+5.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Left previous form behind when winning Roscommon maiden in August (7.5f, good), value for more as had to wait for a gap; weakened badly on AW debut at Dundalk in February; likely to come up short in this company; blinkers."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Dial Me In (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Declan McDonogh",
        "trainer": "Joseph Patrick O'Brien",
        "ts": "64",
        "rpr": "89",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "14-",
        "sire": "Awtaad",
        "dam_sire": "Lord Of England",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-10",
        "score": "54.3",
        "model_pct": "13.7%",
        "fair_odds": "7.30",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "+0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Fourth in Naas barrier trial before successful track debut in 7f Leopardstown auction event (good) last summer, overcoming traffic problems to get up on post; ran below that level when beaten odds-on favourite at Killarney (1m, soft) in July; 282 days off; tongue-tied."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Zia Zabel (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Wayne Lordan",
        "trainer": "Miss Natalia Lupini",
        "ts": "73",
        "rpr": "85",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "24-",
        "sire": "Ghaiyyath",
        "dam_sire": "High Chaparral",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "53.5",
        "model_pct": "12.7%",
        "fair_odds": "7.90",
        "best_dec": "4.00",
        "edge": "-12.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made 200,000euros as a foal but only 100,000gns as a yearling; promising Curragh debut second but failed to build on that when favourite at Leopardstown; off the track 188 days."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Star Strewn (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Adam Caffrey",
        "trainer": "Adrian McGuinness",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "43-18",
        "sire": "Starman",
        "dam_sire": "Bernardini",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "53.4",
        "model_pct": "12.4%",
        "fair_odds": "8.03",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+8.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Promise in two Dundalk runs for Cormac Farrell; impressive winning debut for this yard at Dundalk (7f) in February; finished last of eight when pitched into Listed company at Lingfield on latest; turf debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Brownstown (GB)",
        "jockey": "Gary Carroll",
        "trainer": "Gavin Cromwell",
        "ts": "87",
        "rpr": "97",
        "or": "92",
        "form": "14460-",
        "sire": "Cracksman",
        "dam_sire": "Havana Gold",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "51.2",
        "model_pct": "10.2%",
        "fair_odds": "9.85",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "+0.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won Naas barrier trial last May; successful track debut at Leopardstown (7f, soft) in June; failed to make a major impact in good-class contests thereafter, on latest when midfield in the Goffs Million; entitled to go well at this level and fresh may be the time to catch her."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Sursum Corda (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Chris Hayes",
        "trainer": "David J Geary",
        "ts": "47",
        "rpr": "80",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "6-",
        "sire": "Kodi Bear",
        "dam_sire": "Exceed And Excel",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "46.5",
        "model_pct": "6.4%",
        "fair_odds": "15.58",
        "best_dec": "51.00",
        "edge": "+4.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Not disgraced despite finishing last of six at Leopardstown (sent off 150-1), beaten 7l in a good contest, but can only be watched; 343 days off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,

    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,

        "best_dec": "2.10",
        "edge": "-14.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Camelot colt is out of Group 1-winning miler Amazing Maria; successful on only 2yo start, hampered and hanging badly but doing well under a considerate ride in getting up late in 7f Naas maiden on softish ground; dual Derby entry should appreciate this step up in trip and could be anything."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Limestone (IRE)",
        "jockey": "J M Sheridan",
        "trainer": "Joseph Patrick O'Brien",
        "ts": "85",
        "rpr": "97",
        "or": "98",

        "dam_sire": "Duke Of Marmalade",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "58.3",
        "model_pct": "26.2%",
        "fair_odds": "3.81",
        "best_dec": "3.50",
        "edge": "-8.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Progressed nicely in each of three juvenile runs, bumping into smart Ballydoyle colts on first two before landing Listowel rated race in September, making all on heavy ground (1m); should relish middle-distances this year (Derby entered) and fitted with a tongue-tie for seasonal return."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Mr Vettori (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Shane Foley",
        "trainer": "Mrs John Harrington",
        "ts": "56",
        "rpr": "95",
        "or": "91",
        "form": "021-",
        "sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "55.7",
        "model_pct": "20.2%",
        "fair_odds": "4.96",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Lope De Vega colt improved nicely in three runs at two, notably chasing home the high-class Hawk Mountain in Curragh maiden and final start outstayed long-time leader at Gowran in testing conditions, tending to hang right both occasions; Irish Derby entry looks the type to keep improving and considered."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Summer Is Tomorrow (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Julian Pietropaolo(7)",
        "trainer": "Joseph Patrick O'Brien",
        "ts": "92",
        "rpr": "97",
        "or": "95",
        "form": "51210-",
        "sire": "Mohaather",
        "dam_sire": "Marju",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-12",
        "score": "49.5",
        "model_pct": "10.7%",
        "fair_odds": "9.32",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-0.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Both wins last year came at 7f, in Down Royal maiden (good) and needed every yard when getting up late in Roscommon winners contest on soft, having previously finished third in very valuable Naas auction contest over inadequate 6f; didn't land a blow in Goffs Million (Curragh) final start and takes a step up in trip here on seasonal return from a yard in hot form; rider's claim negates his double penalty."
      }
    ]
  },

        "spotlight": "Two soft ground wins last term included 9.5f Clonmel handicap off 84; didn't count back at 1m on recent seasonal return at the Curragh but entitled to come on for that so don't rule out."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Bay Colony",
        "jockey": "Seamie Heffernan",
        "trainer": "J A Stack",
        "ts": "82",
        "rpr": "95",

        "fair_odds": "11.44",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-7.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Highly tried on occasions, sole win coming in 1m4f Limerick fillies' maiden a year ago; comeback run early this month was full of promise, staying on fourth (fifth won a Group 3 next time) of 18 behind a well handicapped winner over this trip at the Curragh; ideally wants 1m4f but on a nice mark and could well play a major role."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Quatre Bras",
        "jockey": "Reese Holohan(7)",
        "trainer": "Richard John O'Brien",
        "ts": "89",
        "rpr": "101",
        "or": "85",

        "dam_sire": "Elzaam",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "55.9",
        "model_pct": "8.6%",
        "fair_odds": "11.61",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-8.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three-time AW winner (twice at 1m2f); out of form on turf last season but some good runs this term, good second over inadequate 7f at Naas (soft) and nine days ago at Leopardstown when coming late to dead-heat for fourth with Amplitude over this trip, having not had the clearest of runs; better ground here to suit and has to be on the shortlist with rider now claiming 7lb."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,

        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-3.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Lightly raced 4yo didn't debut until June last year, winning Killarney auction maiden on second start; contested 1m6f Listed races both subsequent starts, staying on fourth at Leopardstown and never landed a blow when beaten 5.5l at Ascot in October; drops to handicap company for seasonal return and has to be respected."
      },

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Off the mark in 1m AW maiden at Dundalk in February and beaten under 2l in valuable Lingfield AW handicap early this month over same trip; barely gets 1m2f so potentially vulnerable back on the turf."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Lightly raced maiden shaped well initially in 2yo maidens; missed his entire 3yo campaign and reappeared to chase home a clear winner in 9.5f Gowran maiden; entitled to come on for that although needs to in order to justify this rating on handicap debut."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Landed a 1m maiden at Dundalk on debut impressively in January 2024; off the track (gelded) until never landing a blow in midfield in quite valuable Curragh handicap over same trip early this month (2l off Final Voyage, ahead of Iron Fist); entitled to come on for that and remains unexposed on only third career start and upped in trip."
